title: Graph Algorithms: Count the number (Variant 1)
description: Given an adjacency list representation of a graph, count the number of connected components. Ensure your algorithm is optimized for O(V + E) complexity.

title: Graph Algorithms: Perform BFS traversal (Variant 2)
description: Given an adjacency list representation of a graph, perform bfs traversal starting from node 1. Ensure your algorithm is optimized for O(V + E) complexity.

description: Given an adjacency list representation of a graph, perform dfs traversal starting from node 1. Ensure your algorithm is optimized for O(V + E) complexity.

description: Given an adjacency list representation of a graph, find the shortest path from node 1 to n using bfs. Ensure your algorithm is optimized for O(V + E) complexity.

description: Given an adjacency list representation of a graph, detect if there is a cycle in the undirected graph. Ensure your algorithm is optimized for O(V + E) complexity.
